creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 180711
Proposed patch for x11-toolkits/scintilla (since 428388 revision)

Patch to update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite ports from 3.7.1 to 3.7.3 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
